item.title: Confession Revealed After 40 Years
item.description: A long-delayed confession brings new attention to a decades-old case and the questions that remained unanswered for years.

media:content.media:title: Confession Revealed After 40 Years
media:content.media:description: A long-delayed confession brings new attention to a decades-old case and the questions that remained unanswered for years.

item.title: Routine Flight Turns Into Chaos
item.description: A routine flight takes an unexpected turn in this case overview, focusing on the events and investigation that followed.

media:content.media:title: Routine Flight Turns Into Chaos
media:content.media:description: A routine flight takes an unexpected turn in this case overview, focusing on the events and investigation that followed.

item.title: The Man Who Nearly Got Away With Millions
item.description: A factual look at a case involving millions, the investigation, and how it unfolded.

media:content.media:description: A factual look at a case involving millions, the investigation, and how it unfolded.

item.title: Case of a Boy Found in His Basement
item.description: A factual look at the case of a young boy found in his own basement, with attention to the investigation and unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: Case of a Boy Found in His Basement
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the case of a young boy found in his own basement, with attention to the investigation and unanswered questions.

item.title: Gas Station Mystery Solved After 5 Decades
item.description: A long-unsolved gas station mystery is finally resolved after five decades, bringing closure to a case that remained open for years.

media:content.media:title: Gas Station Mystery Solved After 5 Decades
media:content.media:description: A long-unsolved gas station mystery is finally resolved after five decades, bringing closure to a case that remained open for years.
